productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Wallets
description: Crafted from soft leather, this black wallet from United Colours Of Benetton is fabulously stylish and well organised. This two fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday useDimensions: 12 cm X 9.5 cmHas two main compartmentsSix credit card slots on either sideFour slip pockets, two on either side for coins, id and business cardsTwill tape design in red, white and black stripes in the middle and on the mouth of the main compartmentsBrand name embossed on the topCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
